positioning.repo_lane: STARK-native fused proof architecture for transformer attention/table membership
compete_on: fused attention arithmetic plus lookup membership

systems.name: NANOZK
systems.claim_type: layerwise zero-knowledge proofs for verifiable LLM inference
systems.why_it_matters: Directly competes with broad LLM-verification narratives.
systems.repo_position: Do not claim first LLM verification; differentiate on native STARK fused component architecture.

systems.name: Jolt Atlas
systems.claim_type: lookup-argument zkML framework for model inference
systems.why_it_matters: Lookup-centric zkML is close to the repo's Softmax-table/LogUp theme.
systems.repo_position: Compare lookup philosophy, but keep claim scoped to native Stwo attention/table fusion.

systems.name: zkLLM / zkAttn
systems.claim_type: specialized zero-knowledge protocols for LLMs and attention
systems.why_it_matters: Attention-specific proof systems are the closest conceptual competitor.
systems.repo_position: Use as attention-specialization context; do not imply current fixtures prove full LLM attention exactly.

systems.name: DeepProve-1
systems.claim_type: full LLM inference proof claim for GPT-2-style inference
systems.why_it_matters: Dominates the headline lane for full-model zkML demos.
systems.repo_position: Do not compete on full inference; use as reason to focus the paper on architecture mechanism.

systems.name: EZKL
systems.claim_type: ONNX-to-ZKML tooling using circuit-oriented proving backends
systems.repo_position: Differentiate from generic compilation by showing transformer-aware STARK proof fusion.

systems.name: RISC Zero
systems.claim_type: zkVM computational receipts for arbitrary guest programs
systems.why_it_matters: Useful baseline for statement receipts and semantic checks.
systems.repo_position: Repo already uses zkVM receipts as control surfaces; native Stwo fusion is the distinct lane.

systems.name: StarkWare S-two / LogUp
systems.claim_type: open STARK prover stack with LogUp lookup machinery
systems.why_it_matters: Primary ecosystem and mechanism alignment for the repo.
systems.repo_position: Use as the production-path anchor for native lookup-heavy transformer components.
